task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo Expenses application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Expenses dashboard or list view is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the expense
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Client Dinner with Acme Corp' is entered in the Description or Title field of the new expense form.

task_completion.description: Select the correct category for the expense
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category 'Meals' is selected in the Category or Product dropdown field.
The value '145.50' is entered in the Total or Amount field.

task_completion.description: Select the correct employee to submit on behalf of
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee 'Marc Demo' is selected in the Employee field, overriding the default admin user.
The expense record is saved, indicated by the form transitioning to a read-only view, a 'To Submit' status badge, or the record appearing in the 'My Expenses' list with the correct details.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Odoo interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent created the record in the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the genuine Odoo Expenses form, not a text editor, spreadsheet, or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal window (if visible) does not show direct database insertion commands (like psql) or python scripts used to create the expense.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Employee: Marc Demo. Target Description: 'Client Dinner with Acme Corp'. Target Amount: 145.50. Target Category/Product: 'Meals'. The task requires creating a new expense record in the Odoo 17 Expenses app with these exact details.
